title: BIM Designer
description:
The BIM Designer (Autocad Draftsman) will be responsible for creating and managing digital models of building structures and systems, using Building Information Modeling (BIM) software. The ideal candidate should have a strong technical background, excellent problem-solving skills, and be able to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams.

  • Develop constituent parts of the information model in connection with specific task.
  • Collaborate with architects, engineers, and other stakeholders to ensure model accuracy and completeness.
  • Production of project output.
  • Ownership of model information.
  • Maintain and update BIM models throughout the project lifecycle.
  • Create Revit worksets and understanding of the Revit work-sharing process. Input marked‐up drawings into Revit
  • Download drawings and information from the Web, SharePoint, or project websites (FTP, etc.)
  • Adherence to safety practices in the workplace.


Qualifications and Education Requirements

  • ·Education: Minimum Diploma or Bachelor Degree in Architecture, Engineering, Construction Information Technology or relevant field
  • Experience: Minimum 3 years of experience in BIM modelling
  • Proficiency in BIM software such as Autodesk Revit, AutoCAD, or Bentley MicroStation
  • Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment
  • Familiarity with construction industry standards and practices

postedCompany.description:
WOH HUP (PRIVATE) LIMITED

Established in 1927, Woh Hup began humbly as a one-man business in Malaya. Today, we are Singapore’s largest privately owned construction and civil engineering specialist, with a dedicated 1,000-strong workforce, and a body of work spanning many of Singapore’s most notable and iconic developments.

At the heart of our four-generation family-run business lies a proud heritage of industry, integrity and enterprise, focused on creating lasting value for our clients, improving quality and safety standards on every project, and maximising opportunities for our employees to achieve their career potential. These values have fueled the company’s growth consistently for more than 80 years, and continue to do so.

In our efforts to continuously raise the industry bar, we seek to introduce innovative new building solutions and broaden our skills through strategic joint-venture partnerships with overseas counterparts. This has seen us emerge in recent years from being a principal player in the building of private residential and commercial developments, to becoming a leader too in large-scale civil engineering works, cementing our position at the forefront of the construction industry, locally and regionally.
postedCompany.name: WOH HUP (PRIVATE) LIMITED
